/usr/bin/cc -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/src/physics.c.o CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/src/acro.c.o CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/src/trajectory.c.o CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/src/battery_sim.c.o "CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/home/just_grassy/Desktop/01.Home/01.Projects/git/FPV-LiPo-Thermal-Runaway-Guard/c/src/ecm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/home/just_grassy/Desktop/01.Home/01.Projects/git/FPV-LiPo-Thermal-Runaway-Guard/c/src/ekf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/home/just_grassy/Desktop/01.Home/01.Projects/git/FPV-LiPo-Thermal-Runaway-Guard/c/src/arrhenius.c.o" "CMakeFiles/fpv_battery_sim.dir/home/just_grassy/Desktop/01.Home/01.Projects/git/FPV-LiPo-Thermal-Runaway-Guard/c/src/controller.c.o" -o fpv_battery_sim  -lm
